title: sorbus alnifolia
intro: Sorbus alnifolia, also known as Korean mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Sorbus alnifolia include its ability to support respiratory health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antiviral properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Sorbus alnifolia is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
